arts.ttl: Real Madrid fined for homophobic Guardiola chants
arts.sum: Real Madrid are fined by Uefa after some of their fans directed homophobic chants towards Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola in their Champions League second-leg tie at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr 'living the dream' at Real Madrid amid Saudi interest
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr says he is "living the dream" at Real Madrid and wants to sign a new deal with the Champions League holders.

arts.ttl: 5 Real Madrid stars are at risk of suspension for Atlético 2nd leg
arts.sum: No fewer than five members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid will be forced to walk the disciplinary tightrope in the club’s next outing. This comes…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Atletico Madrid Combined XI: Champions League Round of 16 First Leg
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé and Antoine Griezmann headline Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid's combined starting lineup for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid line-up plans ‘if Fede Valverde can’t play’ against Atlético
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Monday provided something of an insight into his line-up plans for the club’s upcoming showdown with city rivals Atlético. The latest edition…

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: LIVE FROM VALDEBEBAS: Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid Preview, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team. On this episode, Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani, attending Real Madrid ’s training session and pre-game press conference as press, reports from Real Madrid City and gives some pre-game thoughts ahead of Real Madrid’s first leg Champions League clash against Atletico Madrid at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti Named the 'Most Professional Player' He Ever Trained
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti named Philipp Lahm as his pick for the most professional player he has ever trained.

arts.ttl: Vinícius Jr. opens up on Real Madrid contract situation
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. has on Monday provided an insight into his ongoing contract negotiations with the club. Wide-man Vinícius, for his part, has long been locked in talks…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid set for major fitness boost ahead of Champions League derby
arts.sum: Federico Valverde has been absent from Real Madrid's last three matches across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Vitor Reis hype around "young John Stones" wanted by Real Madrid is justified after 'really impressive' Man City home debut
arts.sum: Vitor Reis looks like "a young John Stones" and will develop into a "brilliant footballer", Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole after the defender's "impressive" home debut against Plymouth.
